---
layout: default
title: "National Political and Policy Brief: July 13, 2026"
date: 2026-07-12T21:31:32.144235+00:00
summary: "Parliament debates crypto regulation and electoral reforms while political parties navigate bypoll strategies and internal accountability"
run_time_ist: "3:01AM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 3:01AM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Electoral Reform:</strong> PP Chaudhary is leading high-level consultations on the &#x27;One Nation, One Election&#x27; initiative, a key structural reform for the Union government.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirwFBVV95cUxOOVJPd0xnRkZTNHFSMkdEUDFneUJULVhUcnNRcnNGTi1WWDAteEJIb29DRUphR01OU1ItYlZIejB0QjQ1cGliYTVhUUFsRmU1QmtGbXNmRlZuUkJ1ekNNWlVmZ2k3UktvZWd5WnI1MGU0Zm5zQlpJdWNMemUycnFCZzJaVWhQV0hFUkVtbzdZdWFmeXpIUlJRM3FUdlA5YWFfSURzRWM2Wld2WGxzY0dV?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Political Strategy:</strong> The Congress party has fielded Bhikha Rabari for the Manjalpur bypoll, while Eknath Khadse has reaffirmed his commitment to the NCP (SP), ruling out a return to the BJP.</li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Cryptocurrency Regulation:</strong> The RBI has formally advised Parliament against granting legal status to cryptocurrencies, maintaining its stance on a potential prohibition.</li>
  <li><strong>Accountability and Governance:</strong> The Congress party is intensifying pressure on the Union government regarding the Ram Temple donation row, while the Uttarakhand BJP leadership has pledged action following a donation theft case at Badrinath.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W1</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitAFBVV95cUxPNm91dXk5ZXgtME55RV93bDJpSWw0Z3l1UTA0ZlJaOWpYUzhxVlhJQ1lseF9KMmZfbXo4STRtcGotcXh3NGViV1V4VHoxVmYxeDhkZDUwU3F0TkxYZXhmT0k3MnpvRENEdUZFbXJkZUtSVTUzVi1FSWhVb2piREE5VGQ5eGZQNmpsaDctT25BTVcyWXhrSXhTeHdoUVJPNEVwSUZVMnVkcktrWW83M3FRUFhuR3c?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W2</a></span></li>
</ul>
